\subsection{Generated Known-Truth Results}
This section is generated by \texttt{mce\_irl\_run.py} from the \texttt{experiments.known\_truth} harness. The estimator is the low-level \texttt{MCEIRLEstimator} with \texttt{optimizer=root} and \texttt{compute\_se=False}. Hard gates are enforced on feature matching, occupancy moments, normalized reward/value/Q recovery, policy distance, and Type A/B/C counterfactual regret.

\end{table}

The JSON artifact \texttt{mce\_irl\_results.json} contains the full parameter vectors, empirical and expected feature moments, occupancy residuals, raw RMSE values, normalized RMSE values, and all gate records. Raw parameter cosine is intentionally not a validation gate for MCE-IRL.
